name: Lars Edegran
abstract: Lars Ivar Edegran (born 1944) is a Dixieland jazz musician and bandleader from Sweden. He most often plays piano, guitar, or banjo but has also played mandolin, clarinet, and saxophone.

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Spottswood
about_quotes.evidence: I’m working on a project for GHB Records out of New Orleans, that’s Lars Edegran... that is going to consist of all of the surviving Ma Rainey records... Doug Bensen... has done sound restoration... I think he’s done a glorious job
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Spottswood interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 13, 2023
